x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Application-to-infrastructure mapping is the foundation of Now Assist impact analysis for business applications. Without it, AI cannot determine what infrastructure an application depends on.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Map application CIs to server and database CIs via Service Mapping or relationship import sets. Target: 50%+ of application CIs mapped to underlying infrastructure. Application-to-infrastructure mapping is the foundation of Now Assist impact analysis for business applications.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_72f81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c22
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_airop_check_definition"><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><ai_justification><![CDATA[Application-to-infrastructure mapping is the foundation of Now Assist impact analysis for business applications. Without it, AI cannot determine what infrastructure an application depends on.]]></ai_justification><check_name>Application-to-Infrastructure Mapping</check_name><check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var gaTotal = new GlideAggregate('cmdb_ci_appl');
    gaTotal.addQuery('install_status', 1);
    gaTotal.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaTotal.query();
    var total = gaTotal.next() ? parseInt(gaTotal.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    if (total === 0) {
        return { status: 'not_applicable', actualValue: 'No active application CIs found',
            finding: 'No active application CIs found. Application-to-infrastructure mapping cannot be assessed.' };
    }

    var gaMapped = new GlideAggregate('cmdb_rel_ci');
    gaMapped.addQuery('parent.sys_class_name', 'cmdb_ci_appl');
    gaMapped.addQuery('child.sys_class_name', 'IN', 'cmdb_ci_server,cmdb_ci_database');
    gaMapped.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaMapped.query();
    var mapped = gaMapped.next() ? parseInt(gaMapped.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var pct = Math.round((mapped / total) * 100);
    var actualValue = pct + '% of application CIs mapped to infrastructure (' + mapped + ' of ' + total + ' app CIs)';

    if (pct >= 50) {
        return { status: 'ready', actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: pct + '% of application CIs are mapped to server or database infrastructure. Now Assist can perform AI impact analysis from application down to infrastructure level.' };
    } else if (pct >= 10) {
        return { status: 'needs_attention', actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + pct + '% of application CIs are mapped to infrastructure (target: 50%+). Now Assist AI impact analysis will be incomplete for unmapped applications.' };
    } else {
        return { status: 'not_ready', actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + pct + '% of application CIs are mapped to infrastructure. Now Assist cannot perform meaningful AI impact analysis without application-to-infrastructure relationships.' };
    }
})]]></check_script><is_active>true</is_active><is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive><is_manual>false</is_manual><module>CMDB</module><number>CHK0000386</number><order>140</order><remediation_guidance>Map application CIs to server and database CIs via Service Mapping or relationship import sets. Target: 50%+ of application CIs mapped to underlying infrastructure. Application-to-infrastructure mapping is the foundation of Now Assist impact analysis for business applications.</remediation_guidance><sys_class_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-10 06:41:19</sys_created_on><sys_id>72f81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c22</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Application-to-Infrastructure Mapping</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition_72f81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c22</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-10 06:54:01</sys_updated_on></x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
